purpose: Integrate Dungeon Forge Design System tokens into production app
Provide reusable context for implementing CSS vars, TS interfaces, theme objects, Tailwind config, and utility classes
Document current state vs DS target to avoid re-discovery
applies_to: index.css — CSS custom properties and utilities
design/Dungeon Forge Design System/tokens/tokens.css — source of truth for DS tokens
non_goals: No renaming of existing CSS vars
No modifying existing Tailwind config values
No architectural changes to theme system
No new themes — only extending existing 5
No Firebase, Capacitor, or Android changes

tech_stack.name: React
tech_stack.usage_context: UI framework — functional components, hooks, lazy loading

tech_stack.name: TypeScript
tech_stack.usage_context: Type safety — strict: true, no any, explicit generics

tech_stack.name: Tailwind CSS
tech_stack.usage_context: Utility-first CSS — v3 via PostCSS plugin

conventions: All themes share CLASSIC_DND typography/shape unless overridden
Theme switching via ThemeContext — sets :root CSS properties at runtime
Mobile-first: safe area padding, mobile-bottom-sheet modals

hard: NEVER rename existing CSS variables — add new ones only
NEVER change existing Tailwind config values — extend only
All new TypeScript fields must be optional (?)
All new CSS vars must have fallback values for themes that don't define them
Build must pass after each wave
soft: DS naming (--bg, --fg, etc.) should be aliases pointing to existing --color-* vars
Group new CSS vars by category with section comments matching DS organization
Prefer ?? operator for fallback values in ThemeContext
Do not create new interfaces — only extend existing ones
compatibility: Tailwind v3 + PostCSS plugin only — no v4 @import/@theme/@config directives
React 19 strict mode — cleanup in useEffect required
TypeScript strict: no implicit any, strict null checks
Capacitor 6 Android — no changes needed for this plan
security_requirements: No eval() or dynamic CSS injection vulnerabilities

patterns: CSS vars in :root → Tailwind references via var() → ThemeContext overrides at runtime
5 theme objects as AppTheme with colors/typography/shape → ThemeProvider → setProperty on element.style
PostCSS with tailwindcss + autoprefixer plugins only
Dragon Blood and Elven Forest share CLASSIC_DND's typography and shape via reference

key_components.name: index.css
responsibility: Global CSS: Tailwind directives, :root CSS vars, utility classes, animations
22 existing CSS vars in :root (colors, typography, shape, safe-area)

key_components.name: ThemeShape interface
responsibility: Interface for border-radius and box-shadow tokens
Current fields: borderRadius, borderRadiusLg, borderRadiusXl, boxShadow, boxShadowLg

key_components.name: ThemeTypography interface
responsibility: Interface for font and typography tokens
Current fields: fontFamilyDisplay, fontFamilyBody, fontSizeBase, lineHeightBase

key_components.name: CLASSIC_DND theme
responsibility: Default theme used by DRAGON_BLOOD and ELVEN_FOREST via reference
All 22 color tokens, 4 typography tokens, 5 shape tokens

key_components.name: ThemeContext
responsibility: React context provider for theme state and persistence
Runtime CSS var injection via root.style.setProperty in useEffect
Current: 16 color vars + 4 typography vars + 5 shape vars = 25 setProperty calls

key_components.name: tailwind.config.js
responsibility: Tailwind theme extension — all values reference CSS vars
Extends: colors (16+), fontFamily (display, body), borderRadius (DEFAULT, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, full), boxShadow (DEFAULT, lg), keyframes/animation (fadeIn, scaleUp)

key_components.name: DS tokens.css
responsibility: Source of truth for 72 design tokens
:root block with all 72 vars + 5 per-theme [data-theme] overrides
Non-color tokens (type scale, spacing, motion) are static in :root only

purpose: Global CSS with 22 existing :root vars, utilities, animations
why_relevant: Target for Phase 1 — add ~50 new CSS vars
Target for Phase 4 — update utilities to use new vars

key_elements.description: 22 existing CSS vars grouped by category with comments
Has hardcoded texture URL instead of using --leather-texture var
Has hardcoded shadow values instead of using --accent-glow var

why_relevant: Target for Phase 2 — add optional fields to ThemeShape and ThemeTypography

key_elements.description: 5 fields: borderRadius, borderRadiusLg, borderRadiusXl, boxShadow, boxShadowLg

why_relevant: Target for Phase 2 — add new optional field values to all themes

key_elements.description: Shared shape object referenced by DRAGON_BLOOD and ELVEN_FOREST
Shared typography object referenced by DRAGON_BLOOD and ELVEN_FOREST
Has specific values: borderRadius: 0.125rem, boxShadow: none

purpose: React context that injects theme vars into DOM at runtime
why_relevant: Target for Phase 2 — add new setProperty calls for new CSS vars

key_elements.description: Sets CSS vars on document.documentElement.style when theme changes

purpose: Tailwind config with CSS var bindings
why_relevant: Target for Phase 3 — extend with new DS token mappings

key_elements.description: All extensions: colors, fontFamily, borderRadius, boxShadow, keyframes, animation
display and body fonts — need to add icon font

purpose: Source of truth for 72 design tokens across 5 themes
why_relevant: Reference for all new CSS vars to add

key_elements.description: 72 CSS custom properties covering all categories
5 per-theme overrides for color and elevation tokens

gotchas.text: DS --radius-lg (12px) and --radius-xl (16px) have DIFFERENT values from existing --border-radius-lg (8px) and --border-radius-xl (12px) — both coexist, do not align them
DRAGON_BLOOD and ELVEN_FOREST reference CLASSIC_DND.typography and CLASSIC_DND.shape by object reference — adding new fields to CLASSIC_DND's objects automatically propagates
HIGH_CONTRAST theme has specific elevation (elevRaised/elevModal: 'none') and focusRing values that must be set explicitly
DS alias tokens (--bg, --fg, --border, etc.) must reference existing --color-* vars via var() so they update dynamically when themes change
.leather-bg currently hardcodes the texture URL — must be updated to use var(--leather-texture) after T1 defines it

testing_patterns.test_organization: No tests exist — verify via build only

domain_context.error_handling: ThemeContext uses try/catch around localStorage and defaults to DEFAULT_THEME on error. CSS var fallbacks handle missing values.
domain_context.data_flow: User selects theme → ThemeContext saves to localStorage → useEffect sets :root CSS vars → Tailwind references var() → all components update reactively

open_questions.question: Should --leading-body alias be added when --line-height-base already exists with same value?
open_questions.context: DS tokens.css defines --leading-body: 1.5 which matches existing --line-height-base: 1.5. Adding as alias for DS compatibility.

prior_decisions.decision: Add DS alias tokens as var() references to existing --color-* vars, not as hardcoded values
rationale: Ensures aliases update dynamically when ThemeContext changes themes at runtime
Avoids duplicating color values that would become stale
linked_constraints: Keep the DS naming (--bg, --fg, etc.) as aliases, NOT replacements

prior_decisions.decision: Coexist --radius-* and --border-radius-* with their respective values — do not merge or align
rationale: Rule says 'never rename existing' — both live in parallel
Introduces more granular radius scale (6 values vs 3)
linked_constraints: NEVER rename existing CSS variables — add new ones only

do_not_re_read: design/Dungeon Forge Design System/README.md — overview only, tokens.css has the actual values
design/Dungeon Forge Design System/DESIGN-HANDOFF.md — generic implementation guide, not specific to this codebase
safe_to_assume: Existing --color-* vars remain unchanged throughout this plan
All 5 themes in themes.ts are complete and valid
Tailwind v3 with PostCSS plugin (not v4)
verify_before_use: DS --radius-* values vs existing --border-radius-* values before adding to index.css (values differ)
HIGH_CONTRAST theme specific overrides in tokens.css vs themes.ts
.material-symbols-outlined font-variation-settings in index.css matches DS --icon-* var values
